summary: Integrated ADR 0259 on newest exact main release 0.177.79 by replaying make converge-n8n from commit c54fe1c5, reaffirming n8n as the governed ServerClaw external connector fabric, and re-verifying the public edge, guest-local readiness, and owner-login behavior from the merged mainline state.

verification.check: n8n service contracts and placement guardrails
verification.observed: `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/interface_contracts.py --check-live-apply service:n8n` returned `Live apply contract OK: service:n8n -> playbooks/services/n8n.yml`; `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/standby_capacity.py --service n8n` returned `Decision: approved`; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/service_redundancy.py --check-live-apply --service n8n` returned `declared R1 -> platform R1 -> implemented R0 [gate=unproven] (primary_only) standby=cold@docker-runtime-lv3`; and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/immutable_guest_replacement.py --check-live-apply --service n8n --allow-in-place-mutation` confirmed the service remains governed by immutable guest replacement on `docker-runtime-lv3`.

`make converge-n8n` completed successfully from source commit `c54fe1c579551248792f064e4e281d00aebf6bd0`, merged on top of `origin/main` commit `4a1f518ab7b0f7e5a997110f55c683a6700c1667`, with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=117 changed=2 failed=0 skipped=32`, `postgres-lv3 ok=47 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=7`, `nginx-lv3 ok=37 changed=2 failed=0 skipped=8`, and `localhost ok=18 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=3`.

`curl -fsS https://n8n.lv3.org/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok"}`; `curl -fsSI https://n8n.lv3.org/` returned `HTTP/2 302` with `location: https://n8n.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://n8n.lv3.org/`; and `curl -sSI https://n8n.lv3.org/webhook-test/serverclaw-connector-smoke` returned `HTTP/2 404` from the application without an oauth redirect, preserving the public webhook ingress contract.

verification.check: Guest-local readiness, login, and runtime state
verification.observed: A guest-local verification playbook on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned `readiness_status: 200`, `readiness_body: ok`, `login_email: ops@lv3.org`, and `login_role: global:owner`. `ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ansible -i inventory/hosts.yml docker-runtime-lv3 -m shell -a 'sudo docker ps | grep -w n8n' --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519` showed `docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:2.2.6` and `openbao/openbao:2.5.1` both running.

notes: This receipt supersedes the branch-local ADR 0259 receipt as the canonical mainline truth after release 0.177.79 was applied and re-verified from the integrated worktree.
Release 0.177.79 is the first repo version that includes ADR 0259, while platform version 0.130.50 remains the first verified live platform version where the ADR became true.
The exact-main replay advanced the integrated platform baseline from 0.130.53 to 0.130.54.
The current redundancy report remains at implemented R0 because no recorded R1 rehearsal proof exists yet for n8n; this receipt does not claim that higher redundancy evidence.
